---
title: "City of Moses Lake, Washington Waste Collection Cost of Service Study"
year: 2016
image: /images/moses_lake_WA.jpg
image-alt: "Image of city of Moses Lake, Washington"
categories: ["Rate Setting"]
---
{{< include _return-to-pf.qmd >}}

:::
